race.comment: TRUMP CARD (4) was a touch disappointing in town last time out but the form prior was good enough for a race of this calibre. Has only missed a drum once in six spins around this circuit and should be right there when the whips are cracking. SACRED BULL (7) got the job done over this track and trip last time out and winning rider Thompson sticks in the irons. Capable of back-to-back victories. CHILLAXING (2) is improving with racing this time in work and must be respected out of the Gollan barn. Top-three credentials. HEAVENLY LOVE (8) has placed over this course and distance and maps ideally for this from gate two. In the mix. YUKANUMA (1) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
